name: PagerDuty
description: PagerDuty is an incident management platform for real-time operations. Manage incidents, services, escalation policies, schedules, on-call rotations, and change events through the REST API.

capabilities.name: incidents_list
capabilities.description: List incidents with filtering by status, urgency, and date range.

capabilities.name: incidents_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific incident by ID.

capabilities.name: incidents_create
capabilities.description: Create a new incident on a service.

capabilities.name: incidents_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing incident (acknowledge, resolve, etc.).

capabilities.name: incidents_merge
capabilities.description: Merge multiple incidents into a single incident.

capabilities.name: incidents_notes_list
capabilities.description: List notes on an incident.

capabilities.name: incidents_notes_create
capabilities.description: Add a note to an incident.

capabilities.name: services_list
capabilities.description: List all services with their status and configuration.

capabilities.name: services_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific service by ID.

capabilities.name: services_create
capabilities.description: Create a new service with escalation policy.

capabilities.name: services_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing service.

capabilities.name: services_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a service.

capabilities.name: escalation_policies_list
capabilities.description: List all escalation policies.

capabilities.name: escalation_policies_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific escalation policy by ID.

capabilities.name: escalation_policies_create
capabilities.description: Create a new escalation policy with rules and targets.

capabilities.name: escalation_policies_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing escalation policy.

capabilities.name: escalation_policies_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an escalation policy.

capabilities.name: users_list
capabilities.description: List all users in the account.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific user by ID.

capabilities.name: teams_list
capabilities.description: List all teams.

capabilities.name: teams_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific team by ID.

capabilities.name: schedules_list
capabilities.description: List all on-call schedules.

capabilities.name: schedules_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific schedule with on-call entries.

capabilities.name: oncalls_list
capabilities.description: List who is currently on call across all escalation policies.

capabilities.name: analytics_incidents_get
capabilities.description: Get aggregated incident analytics data.

capabilities.name: change_events_list
capabilities.description: List change events with filtering.

capabilities.name: change_events_create
capabilities.description: Create a change event to track deployments and changes.

capabilities.name: status_dashboards_list
capabilities.description: List all status dashboards.
